name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.01: fix rowToOperator dropping kennitala/paydayCustomerId (and address/logoUrl) on every read — these were saved to SQLite but stripped on the way out, so the operator link prefilled blank and the billing portal saw no paydayCustomerId. Now they round-trip. Builds on v5.00 live Payday integration.
